samples.text: All planets orbit a star. Earth is a planet. Does Earth orbit a star?
Every planet travels around a star. Earth belongs to the category of planets. Does Earth travel around a star?
All celestial bodies of the planetary class revolve around a stellar body. Earth is a celestial body of the planetary class. Does Earth revolve around a stellar body?
Earth is classified as a planet. The class of planets is defined by orbiting a star. Does Earth orbit a star?
All planets orbit a star. Earth is a planet. The moon is Earth's natural satellite. Does Earth orbit a star?
